title: Hardened Enchantment
description: Ever wanted your shield to be similar to an armor piece?
body:
# 📢Announcement
All future updates to this datapack will be available only on [Way too many Enchantments](https://modrinth.com/project/silvers_way-too-many-enchantments!), this will also mean this project will be permenantly archived until further notice.

# Description
Ever wanted your shield to be similar to an armor piece? well with the Hardened enchantment you can gain armor points and also a little bit of armor toughness.

### Armor
base will give you +3 armor points and Per level you will gain +2 armor points.

### Armor Toughness
Base will give you +0.6 armor toughness and +0.6 armor toughness's per level


### Comments:
Well? Did you like it?, Consider checking my other Projects!
- [Way too many Datapacks!](https://modrinth.com/collection/aqrbm311)
- [Way too many Enchantments!](https://modrinth.com/collection/90b6VDPP)
